languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

languages.text: "Меня беспокоит, что гвардейцы Заркова провели столь много времени без направляющей руки закона. Стоит задуматься о том, чтобы отправить на планету гарнизон блюстителей".
"I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."
languages.original_text: "Меня беспокоит, что гвардейцы Заркова провели столь много времени без направляющей руки закона. Стоит задуматься о том, чтобы отправить на планету гарнизон блюстителей".

"I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."
"I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

languages.text: 「ザルコフの衛兵が法律の指針なしに長い間過ごしてきたことに、私は懸念を感じています。惑星に執行官の駐屯軍を派遣することは、検討に値するかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: ザルコフの衛兵が法律の指針なしに長い間過ごしてきたことに、私は懸念を感じています。惑星に執行官の駐屯軍を派遣することは、検討に値するかもしれません。

languages.text: « Je ne peux pas m'empêcher de m'inquiéter quand je pense que les gardes impériaux de Zarkov vivent depuis si longtemps sans les dispositions de la loi pour les guider. Il faudrait peut-être envisager d'envoyer une garnison de prévôts sur la planète. »
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne peux pas m'empêcher de m'inquiéter quand je pense que les gardes impériaux de Zarkov vivent depuis si longtemps sans les dispositions de la loi pour les guider. Il faudrait peut-être envisager d'envoyer une garnison de prévôts sur la planète. »

languages.text: "Ich finde es bedenklich, dass die Gardisten von Zarkov so lange ohne die lenkende Hand des Gesetzes waren. Vielleicht sollten wir über die Stationierung einer Garnison von Enforcern auf dem Planeten nachdenken."
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: "Ich finde es bedenklich, dass die Gardisten von Zarkov so lange ohne die lenkende Hand des Gesetzes waren. Vielleicht sollten wir über die Stationierung einer Garnison von Enforcern auf dem Planeten nachdenken."

languages.text: "Zarkov Muhafızları'nın kanunun yol gösterici eli olmadan bu kadar uzun zaman geçirmesi beni endişelendiriyor. Belki de gezegene bir infazcı garnizonu göndermeyi düşünmek gerekebilir."
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov Muhafızları'nın kanunun yol gösterici eli olmadan bu kadar uzun zaman geçirmesi beni endişelendiriyor. Belki de gezegene bir infazcı garnizonu göndermeyi düşünmek gerekebilir."

languages.text: «Encuentro preocupante que la guardia imperial de Zarkov se haya pasado tanto tiempo sin la debida tutela que ofrece la ley. Tal vez merezca la pena apostar una guarnición en el planeta».
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: «Encuentro preocupante que la guardia imperial de Zarkov se haya pasado tanto tiempo sin la debida tutela que ofrece la ley. Tal vez merezca la pena apostar una guarnición en el planeta».

languages.text: “扎尔科夫的卫兵长期缺乏律法的指引，这令我深感忧虑。或许应该考虑向该行星派遣一支执法者驻军。”
languages.original_text: "I find it concerning that the Guardsmen of Zarkov have spent so long without the guiding hand of the law. Perhaps dispatching a garrison of enforcers to the planet is worth considering."

traits.locale_text: “扎尔科夫的卫兵长期缺乏律法的指引，这令我深感忧虑。或许应该考虑向该行星派遣一支执法者驻军。”
